title: Summer of Standard.site
summary: We've partnered with three blogging platforms built on AT Protocol — Offprint, Leaflet, and pckt.blog — to give you 25% off any annual plan this summer.
content:
We've partnered with three blogging platforms built on AT Protocol, the tech that powers Bluesky, to make it even easier to get writing. It's free to get started with Offprint, Leaflet, or pckt.blog, and if you sign up for one of their Pro plans for extra features you'll get 25% off, on us. That covers a whole summer's worth of blogging! Try one or try all three to see which one feels right for you.

Since we launched our Standard.site integration into the Bluesky app, we've been thrilled to see so many writers adopting this community-built format for longform writing. And people are building new apps, like Standard Reader, to take it all in.

Because these apps are built on the same technology as Bluesky—the AT Protocol—you can sign with your existing handle, keep your followers even if you migrate to a new home, and truly own all of your writing.

If you're ready to take your posting to the next level, start that food blog, give your hottest takes a bit more room, or just have more fun online, now's a great (and financially prudent) time to do it.

Get started for free then get 25% off your first year when you sign up for an annual plan from:

  • Offprint
  • Leaflet
  • pckt.blog
